notes: Linux-based unified NAS/iSCSI platform for Snap Servers; v3.1 added iSCSI/NDMP/server-to-server replication (Dec 2004)
File-level storage appliances; NFS/CIFS/SMB protocols; NetApp, EMC Celerra, Snap Servers
SCSI block-storage commands over TCP/IP Ethernet; IETF RFC 3720 (2004); low-cost alternative to Fibre Channel SAN
Open protocol for enterprise-wide backup of heterogeneous file servers; originated at NetApp/Intelliguard
Scheduled file-and-block replication between Snap Servers; block-level, flexible bandwidth control; precursor to mainstream storage-replication features
Free/open-source Unix-like OS kernel; foundation of most server, embedded, and Android systems
